name: Files Type
abstract: DataDownload with checksum, size, encoding format, and file detail. Defines properties: schema:additionalType, schema:description, schema:size, resultTarget, schema:relatedLink. Uses building blocks: dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), stringArray (geochemProperties), image (geochemProperties), imageMap (geochemProperties), tabularData (geochemProperties), collection (geochemProperties), dataCube (geochemProperties), document (geochemProperties), supDocImage (geochemProperties), otherFile (geochemProperties).
